tasks.label: validate-all
tasks.command: node scripts/validate-runtime-wiring.mjs 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cbx-validate-runtime.txt && node scripts/validate-shared-routing.mjs 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cbx-validate-routing.txt && node scripts/validate-skill-packaging.mjs 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cbx-validate-packaging.txt && node scripts/sync-skill-mirrors.mjs --check 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cbx-sync-check.txt && node scripts/generate-skills-index.mjs --check 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cbx-index-check.txt && echo 'ALL_DONE' | tee /tmp/cbx-validate-done.txt

tasks.label: check-handoffs
tasks.command: node scripts/validate-runtime-wiring.mjs 2>&1 | grep -E 'handoff|skill|agent|FAIL|error' | head -30; echo '---'; ls workflows/workflows/agent-environment-setup/shared/agents/ | sed 's/.md//' | sort > /tmp/agent-names.txt && grep -r 'handoffs:' workflows/workflows/agent-environment-setup/shared/agents/ -A 20 | grep -E '^workflows.*:|-  ' | head -80
